sessions.label: morning
messageSample: Remember when you learned 'Japan's 'Osechi Ryori' New Year food tradition assigns specific meanings to every dish — black beans represent health, herring roe represents fertility, and shrimp represent longevity because they curl like an old person's back.'? That's permanently filed in my geological cross-reference now.

sessions.label: outside
messageSample: I still get excited thinking about 'Japan's 'Osechi Ryori' New Year food tradition assigns specific meanings to every dish — black beans represent health, herring roe represents fertility, and shrimp represent longevity because they curl like an old person's back.' — what a discovery that was!

sessions.label: evening
messageSample: A productive evening! +25 dust & +1 O₂ Tank!
